ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the building (if applicable) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the building is located */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of completion */,
  "height_m" REAL /* Height of the building in meters */,
  "height_ft" REAL /* Height of the building in feet */,
  "floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the building */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the function of the building */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current status of the building */,
  "latitude" REAL /* GPS latitude for the building */,
  "longitude" REAL /* GPS longitude for the building */,
  "construction_start_date" TEXT /* Date when construction started */,
  "projected_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of completion */,
  "architect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the architect responsible for the design */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer of the building */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the building project */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES building_functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES building_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_architect_id FOREIGN KEY ("architect_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "mayor" TEXT /* Name of the city's mayor */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the city data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "max_occupancy" INTEGER /* Maximum occupancy for the building function */,
  "safety_requirements" TEXT /* Safety requirements specific to the function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation of the status */,
  "alert_level" INTEGER /* Alert level for the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new status */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the status change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the status change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the status change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_changes_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_changes_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES building_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_changes_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the building data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the building data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
